_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 expression profiling in IDH-wildtype glioblastoma: genomic associations and survival outcomes.

_contextSnippet: We next asked whether IHC would be associated with NF1 genomic status and found positive phospho-ERK immunostaining to be associated with NF1 genomic loss (p = 0.045)
details: Positive phospho-ERK immunostaining was associated with NF1 genomic loss (p = 0.045)
